RuleSet.Name: src/schemaprot/ISchemaProtTablePKey.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 25 protected interface for a $TableName$ primary key object.

GenFile.Name: reallyIFileSchemaProtTablePKeyJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot

RuleSet.GenRule: $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declProtColumnGetterSetter )$$declProtRecPKeyEquals$$declProtRecPKeyHashCode$$declProtRecPKeyCompareTo$$reference PrimaryKeyIndex declProtRecPKeyToString$
public $emitProtInterfaceDataType$ get$OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$();$switch IsToIndexUnique yes declISchemaProtTablePKeyRelationSetter default empty$

public void set$OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$(I$reference ToTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference ToTable TableName$ argObj); public void set$OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$($iterate Columns(first declProtSetArgColumn each declProtCommaSetArgColumn)$);
$reference FromCol reference Column implProtJavaAtomType$ arg$reference FromCol reference Column Name$
$iterate Columns( lone implProtColumnIdAttr first empty each empty empty empty )$
$iterate Columns( lone implProtJavaAtomType first empty each empty empty empty )$
$iterate Columns( lone implProtJavaOptAtomType first empty each empty empty empty )$
$iterate Columns( lone implProtJavaReqAtomType first empty each empty empty empty )$
public int getRequiredRevision(); public void setRequiredRevision( int value );
public int getClassCode(); public void setClassCode( int value );
$switch IsNullable yes declProtOptGetter default declProtReqGetter$$switch IsNullable yes declProtOptSetter default declProtReqSetter$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declProtReqBlobGetter BoolDef declProtReqBoolGetter EnumDef declProtReqEnumGetter Id16Gen declProtReqInt16Getter Id32Gen declProtReqInt32Getter Id64Gen declProtReqInt64Getter Int16Def declProtReqInt16Getter Int32Def declProtReqInt32Getter Int64Def declProtReqInt64Getter UInt16Def declProtReqUInt16Getter UInt32Def declProtReqUInt32Getter UInt64Def declProtReqUInt64Getter FloatDef declProtReqFloatGetter DoubleDef declProtReqDoubleGetter NumberDef declProtReqNumberGetter DateDef declProtReqDateGetter TimeDef declProtReqTimeGetter TimestampDef declProtReqTimestampGetter TZDateDef declProtReqTZDateGetter TZTimeDef declProtReqTZTimeGetter TZTimestampDef declProtReqTZTimestampGetter DbKeyHash128Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash128Getter DbKeyHash160Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash160Getter DbKeyHash224Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash224Getter DbKeyHash256Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash256Getter DbKeyHash384Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash384Getter DbKeyHash512Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash512Getter DbKeyHash128Def declProtReqDbKeyHash128Getter DbKeyHash160Def declProtReqDbKeyHash160Getter DbKeyHash224Def declProtReqDbKeyHash224Getter DbKeyHash256Def declProtReqDbKeyHash256Getter DbKeyHash384Def declProtReqDbKeyHash384Getter DbKeyHash512Def declProtReqDbKeyHash512Getter Uuid6Gen declProtReqUuid6Getter Uuid6Def declProtReqUuid6Getter UuidGen declProtReqUuidGetter UuidDef declProtReqUuidGetter StringDef declProtReqStringGetter TokenDef declProtReqTokenGetter NmTokenDef declProtReqNmTokenGetter NmTokensDef declProtReqNmTokensGetter TextDef declProtReqTextGetter default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declProtOptBlobGetter BoolDef declProtOptBoolGetter EnumDef declProtOptEnumGetter Id16Gen declProtOptInt16Getter Id32Gen declProtOptInt32Getter Id64Gen declProtOptInt64Getter Int16Def declProtOptInt16Getter Int32Def declProtOptInt32Getter Int64Def declProtOptInt64Getter UInt16Def declProtOptUInt16Getter UInt32Def declProtOptUInt32Getter UInt64Def declProtOptUInt64Getter FloatDef declProtOptFloatGetter DoubleDef declProtOptDoubleGetter NumberDef declProtOptNumberGetter DateDef declProtOptDateGetter TimeDef declProtOptTimeGetter TimestampDef declProtOptTimestampGetter TZDateDef declProtOptTZDateGetter TZTimeDef declProtOptTZTimeGetter TZTimestampDef declProtOptTZTimestampGetter DbKeyHash128Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash128Getter DbKeyHash160Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash160Getter DbKeyHash224Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash224Getter DbKeyHash256Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash256Getter DbKeyHash384Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash384Getter DbKeyHash512Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash512Getter DbKeyHash128Def declProtOptDbKeyHash128Getter DbKeyHash160Def declProtOptDbKeyHash160Getter DbKeyHash224Def declProtOptDbKeyHash224Getter DbKeyHash256Def declProtOptDbKeyHash256Getter DbKeyHash384Def declProtOptDbKeyHash384Getter DbKeyHash512Def declProtOptDbKeyHash512Getter Uuid6Gen declProtOptUuid6Getter Uuid6Def declProtOptUuid6Getter UuidGen declProtOptUuidGetter UuidDef declProtOptUuidGetter StringDef declProtOptStringGetter TokenDef declProtOptTokenGetter NmTokenDef declProtOptNmTokenGetter NmTokensDef declProtOptNmTokensGetter TextDef declProtOptTextGetter default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declProtReqBlobSetter BoolDef declProtReqBoolSetter EnumDef declProtReqEnumSetter Id16Gen declProtReqInt16Setter Id32Gen declProtReqInt32Setter Id64Gen declProtReqInt64Setter Int16Def declProtReqInt16Setter Int32Def declProtReqInt32Setter Int64Def declProtReqInt64Setter UInt16Def declProtReqUInt16Setter UInt32Def declProtReqUInt32Setter UInt64Def declProtReqUInt64Setter FloatDef declProtReqFloatSetter DoubleDef declProtReqDoubleSetter NumberDef declProtReqNumberSetter DateDef declProtReqDateSetter TimeDef declProtReqTimeSetter TimestampDef declProtReqTimestampSetter TZDateDef declProtReqTZDateSetter TZTimeDef declProtReqTZTimeSetter TZTimestampDef declProtReqTZTimestampSetter DbKeyHash128Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash128Setter DbKeyHash160Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash160Setter DbKeyHash224Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash224Setter DbKeyHash256Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash256Setter DbKeyHash384Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash384Setter DbKeyHash512Gen declProtReqDbKeyHash512Setter DbKeyHash128Def declProtReqDbKeyHash128Setter DbKeyHash160Def declProtReqDbKeyHash160Setter DbKeyHash224Def declProtReqDbKeyHash224Setter DbKeyHash256Def declProtReqDbKeyHash256Setter DbKeyHash384Def declProtReqDbKeyHash384Setter DbKeyHash512Def declProtReqDbKeyHash512Setter Uuid6Gen declProtReqUuid6Setter Uuid6Def declProtReqUuid6Setter UuidGen declProtReqUuidSetter UuidDef declProtReqUuidSetter StringDef declProtReqStringSetter TokenDef declProtReqTokenSetter NmTokenDef declProtReqNmTokenSetter NmTokensDef declProtReqNmTokensSetter TextDef declProtReqTextSetter default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declProtOptBlobSetter BoolDef declProtOptBoolSetter EnumDef declProtOptEnumSetter Id16Gen declProtOptInt16Setter Id32Gen declProtOptInt32Setter Id64Gen declProtOptInt64Setter Int16Def declProtOptInt16Setter Int32Def declProtOptInt32Setter Int64Def declProtOptInt64Setter UInt16Def declProtOptUInt16Setter UInt32Def declProtOptUInt32Setter UInt64Def declProtOptUInt64Setter FloatDef declProtOptFloatSetter DoubleDef declProtOptDoubleSetter NumberDef declProtOptNumberSetter DateDef declProtOptDateSetter TimeDef declProtOptTimeSetter TimestampDef declProtOptTimestampSetter TZDateDef declProtOptTZDateSetter TZTimeDef declProtOptTZTimeSetter TZTimestampDef declProtOptTZTimestampSetter DbKeyHash128Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash128Setter DbKeyHash160Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash160Setter DbKeyHash224Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash224Setter DbKeyHash256Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash256Setter DbKeyHash384Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash384Setter DbKeyHash512Gen declProtOptDbKeyHash512Setter DbKeyHash128Def declProtOptDbKeyHash128Setter DbKeyHash160Def declProtOptDbKeyHash160Setter DbKeyHash224Def declProtOptDbKeyHash224Setter DbKeyHash256Def declProtOptDbKeyHash256Setter DbKeyHash384Def declProtOptDbKeyHash384Setter DbKeyHash512Def declProtOptDbKeyHash512Setter Uuid6Gen declProtOptUuid6Setter Uuid6Def declProtOptUuid6Setter UuidGen declProtOptUuidSetter UuidDef declProtOptUuidSetter StringDef declProtOptStringSetter TokenDef declProtOptTokenSetter NmTokenDef declProtOptNmTokenSetter NmTokensDef declProtOptNmTokensSetter TextDef declProtOptTextSetter default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declProtBlobMinValue BoolDef declProtBoolMinValue EnumDef declProtEnumMinValue Id16Gen declProtInt16MinValue Id32Gen declProtInt32MinValue Id64Gen declProtInt64MinValue Int16Def declProtInt16MinValue Int32Def declProtInt32MinValue Int64Def declProtInt64MinValue UInt16Def declProtUInt16MinValue UInt32Def declProtUInt32MinValue UInt64Def declProtUInt64MinValue FloatDef declProtFloatMinValue DoubleDef declProtDoubleMinValue NumberDef declProtNumberMinValue DateDef declProtDateMinValue TimeDef declProtTimeMinValue TimestampDef declProtTimestampMinValue TZDateDef declProtTZDateMinValue TZTimeDef declProtTZTimeMinValue TZTimestampDef declProtTZTimestampMinValue DbKeyHash128Gen empty DbKeyHash160Gen empty DbKeyHash224Gen empty DbKeyHash256Gen empty DbKeyHash384Gen empty DbKeyHash512Gen empty DbKeyHash128Def empty DbKeyHash160Def empty DbKeyHash224Def empty DbKeyHash256Def empty DbKeyHash384Def empty DbKeyHash512Def empty Uuid6Gen empty Uuid6Def empty UuidGen declProtUuidMinValue UuidDef declProtUuidMinValue StringDef declProtStringMinValue TokenDef declProtTokenMinValue NmTokenDef declProtNmTokenMinValue NmTokensDef declProtNmTokensMinValue TextDef declProtTextMinValue default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declProtBlobMaxValue BoolDef declProtBoolMaxValue EnumDef declProtEnumMaxValue Id16Gen declProtInt16MaxValue Id32Gen declProtInt32MaxValue Id64Gen declProtInt64MaxValue Int16Def declProtInt16MaxValue Int32Def declProtInt32MaxValue Int64Def declProtInt64MaxValue UInt16Def declProtUInt16MaxValue UInt32Def declProtUInt32MaxValue UInt64Def declProtUInt64MaxValue FloatDef declProtFloatMaxValue DoubleDef declProtDoubleMaxValue NumberDef declProtNumberMaxValue DateDef declProtDateMaxValue TimeDef declProtTimeMaxValue TimestampDef declProtTimestampMaxValue TZDateDef declProtTZDateMaxValue TZTimeDef declProtTZTimeMaxValue TZTimestampDef declProtTZTimestampMaxValue DbKeyHash128Gen empty DbKeyHash160Gen empty DbKeyHash224Gen empty DbKeyHash256Gen empty DbKeyHash384Gen empty DbKeyHash512Gen empty DbKeyHash128Def empty DbKeyHash160Def empty DbKeyHash224Def empty DbKeyHash256Def empty DbKeyHash384Def empty DbKeyHash512Def empty Uuid6Gen empty Uuid6Def empty UuidGen declProtUuidMaxValue UuidDef declProtUuidMaxValue StringDef declProtStringMaxValue TokenDef declProtTokenMaxValue NmTokenDef declProtNmTokenMaxValue NmTokensDef declProtNmTokensMaxValue TextDef declProtTextMaxValue default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declProtBlobInitValue BoolDef declProtBoolInitValue EnumDef declProtEnumInitValue Id16Gen declProtInt16InitValue Id32Gen declProtInt32InitValue Id64Gen declProtInt64InitValue Int16Def declProtInt16InitValue Int32Def declProtInt32InitValue Int64Def declProtInt64InitValue UInt16Def declProtUInt16InitValue UInt32Def declProtUInt32InitValue UInt64Def declProtUInt64InitValue FloatDef declProtFloatInitValue DoubleDef declProtDoubleInitValue NumberDef declProtNumberInitValue DateDef declProtDateInitValue TimeDef declProtTimeInitValue TimestampDef declProtTimestampInitValue TZDateDef declProtTZDateInitValue TZTimeDef declProtTZTimeInitValue TZTimestampDef declProtTZTimestampInitValue DbKeyHash128Gen declProtDbKeyHash128InitValue DbKeyHash160Gen declProtDbKeyHash160InitValue DbKeyHash224Gen declProtDbKeyHash224InitValue DbKeyHash256Gen declProtDbKeyHash256InitValue DbKeyHash384Gen declProtDbKeyHash384InitValue DbKeyHash512Gen declProtDbKeyHash512InitValue DbKeyHash128Def declProtDbKeyHash128InitValue DbKeyHash160Def declProtDbKeyHash160InitValue DbKeyHash224Def declProtDbKeyHash224InitValue DbKeyHash256Def declProtDbKeyHash256InitValue DbKeyHash384Def declProtDbKeyHash384InitValue DbKeyHash512Def declProtDbKeyHash512InitValue Uuid6Gen declProtUuid6InitValue Uuid6Def declProtUuid6InitValue UuidGen declProtUuidInitValue UuidDef declProtUuidInitValue StringDef declProtStringInitValue TokenDef declProtTokenInitValue NmTokenDef declProtNmTokenInitValue NmTokensDef declProtNmTokensInitValue TextDef declProtTextInitValue default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$
public final static boolean $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch InitValue yes true default false$;

public static final I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$ProtSchema.$reference DataType Name$ $upper Name$_MIN_VALUE = I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$ProtSchema.$reference DataType Name$.$reference DataType iterate Tag( first declProtEnumMinValueEmitTagName each empty )$;

public static final I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$ProtSchema.$reference DataType Name$ $upper Name$_MAX_VALUE = I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$ProtSchema.$reference DataType Name$.$reference DataType iterate Tag( last declProtEnumMaxValueEmitTagName each empty )$;

public static final I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$ProtSchema.$reference DataType Name$ $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch IsNullable yes declProtEnumInitValueNull default declProtEnumInitValueAlways$;
I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$ProtSchema.$reference DataType Name$.$reference DataType iterate Tag( first declProtEnumInitValueUseFirstTagName each empty )$
public I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$ProtSchema.$reference DataType Name$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$();
public void set$implProtColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$ProtSchema.$reference DataType Name$ value );
public I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$ProtSchema.$reference DataType Name$ get$implProtColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$();
public void set$implProtColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$ProtSchema.$reference DataType Name$ value );
public static final short $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = (short)$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$;
$switch BaseModelAtomClass Int64Def emitProtLForLong Id64Gen emitProtLForLong UInt64Def emitProtLForLong UInt32Def emitProtLForLong default empty$
public static final int $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$;
public static final long $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$L;
public static final int $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$;
public static final long $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$L;
public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_MIN_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Prot.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$Prot.$TableName$.$Name$", 19, 0, "$MinValue$" );
public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_MAX_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Prot.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$Prot.$TableName$.$Name$", 19, 0, "$MaxValue$" );

public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Prot.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$Prot.$TableName$.$Name$", 19, 0, "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$" );
public static final float $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = (float)$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$;
public static final double $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$;

public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_MIN_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Prot.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$Prot.$TableName$.$Name$", $Digits$, $Precis$, "$MinValue$" );

public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_MAX_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Prot.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$.$TableName$Prot.$Name$", $Digits$, $Precis$, "$MaxValue$" );

public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Prot.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$Prot.$TableName$.$Name$", $Digits$, $Precis$, "$InitValue$" );
public static final LocalDate $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLib.getUTCLocalDate( 1970, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0 );
public static final LocalTime $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibXmlUtil.parseTime("00:00:00");

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero128bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash128 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash128.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero160bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash160 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash160.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero224bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash224 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash224.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero256bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash256 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash256.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero384bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash384 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash384.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero512bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash512 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash512.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );
public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$InitValue$"; public static final CFLibUuid6 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibUuid6.fromString( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );
public static final UUID $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = UUID.fromString( "$InitValue$" );
public static final String $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = new String( "$InitValue$" );
public static final String $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = new String( "$InitValue$" );
public static final String $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = new String( "$InitValue$" );
public static final String $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = new String( "$InitValue$" );
public static final String $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = new String( "$InitValue$" );
//@Override public int compareTo( I$poptop SchemaDef SchemaName$Prot$TableName$PKey rhs );
